records.ety: [L. suburbium; sub under, below, near + urbs a city. See Urban.]

defs: An outlying part of a city or town; a smaller place immediately adjacent to a city; in the plural, the region which is on the confines of any city or large town; as, a house stands in the suburbs; a garden situated in the suburbs of Paris.
quotes: [London] could hardly have contained less than thirty or forty thousand souls within its walls; and the suburbs were very populous.

defs: Hence, the confines; the outer part; the environment.
quotes: The suburb of their straw-built citadel.
